kitchenCost.title: Kitchen Renovation Cost Vancouver BC (2026) | Reno Stars
kitchenCost.description: How much does a kitchen renovation cost in Vancouver? Real pricing from $15,000 to $72,000 based on 16 completed projects. Get accurate cost breakdowns by tier.

bathroomCost.description: What is the average bathroom renovation cost in Vancouver? Real prices from $10K–$60K+ based on 19 completed projects. Full cost breakdown by 3-piece, 4-piece & 5-piece bathrooms.

wholeHouseCost.title: Whole House Renovation Cost Vancouver BC (2026) | Reno Stars
wholeHouseCost.description: Whole house renovation cost in Vancouver: $50K–$200K+ from real projects. Full breakdown by scope — kitchens, bathrooms, flooring and more. Get a free estimate from Reno Stars.

basementCost.title: Basement Renovation Cost Vancouver BC (2026) | Reno Stars
basementCost.description: How much does a basement renovation cost in Vancouver? Typical pricing from $30,000 to $120,000+ for Greater Vancouver. Get accurate cost breakdowns by tier, plus money-saving tips.

commercialCost.title: Commercial Renovation Cost in Vancouver BC (2026) | Reno Stars

cabinetCost.description: How much does cabinet refinishing cost in Vancouver? Typical pricing from $4,000 to $15,000 for Greater Vancouver. Compare refinishing, refacing, and full replacement options.

basementSuiteCost.title: Basement Suite Conversion Cost Vancouver BC (2026) | Reno Stars
basementSuiteCost.description: How much does a legal basement suite cost in Vancouver? Typical pricing from $60,000 to $150,000. Detailed cost breakdown, ROI analysis, and municipal regulations.
